samples.text: All insects are animals. An ant is an insect. Therefore, is an ant an animal?
Every insect belongs to the category of animals. An ant is classified as an insect. Does this mean an ant is an animal?
All arthropods are animals. A worker ant is an arthropod. Therefore, is a worker ant an animal?
An ant belongs to the group of insects. The group of insects falls under animals. Based on this, is an ant an animal?
All insects are animals. An ant is an insect. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is an ant an animal?
